title: Minimal task crew briefing contract
acceptance: `team plan` identifies `Task Captain`, `Atomization Planner`, `Code Builder`, and `Check Runner` for a small task.
The output distinguishes required roles from optional roles.
The briefing contract includes allowed files, do-not-touch paths, expected reports, and stop conditions.
No subagents are spawned and no team runtime file is written.
The atomization map covers any new docs, scripts, or command surface touched by this card.
outOfScope: Changing task close or batch checkpoint behavior
nonGoals: Do not implement permission lease enforcement
Do not add Atomic Police patrol automation
rollbackNotes: Revert the crew contract docs and CLI contract changes together.

importDiagnostics.message: Front-matter `deliverables` key is present; body section deliverables were ignored in favour of front-matter values.

notes: This card is the first framework-side Team Agents implementation card. It should stay small enough to review in isolation.
